channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Kuwait backs Pakistan’s diplomatic role in mediating between the US and Iran
item.description: In a phone conversation held on Friday, Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif briefed Kuwait’s Crown Prince Sheikh Sabah Al Khaled Al Hamad Al Sabah on Pakistan’s latest diplomatic initiative aimed at easing ...

item.title: Renovated East York home sells for $1.25 million after price adjustments
item.description: A recently renovated three-bedroom home in East York, Toronto, sold for $1.25 million after undergoing a series of pricing changes. Initially listed at $1,049,900 in mid-January 2026, the property att...

item.title: TotalEnergies reverses early diesel price increase after retailer opposition
item.description: TotalEnergies has withdrawn its plan to raise diesel prices by R8 a litre ahead of the official April fuel price adjustment, following opposition from the Fuel Retailers Association (FRA). The company...

item.title: Understanding How Most Electricity Ultimately Originates from the Sun
item.description: The article explains that nearly all energy used on Earth, regardless of the source, originates from the sun. Fossil fuels like coal, oil, and natural gas are stored solar energy from prehistoric plan...

item.title: Karachi court sentences man for sharing woman’s explicit videos with family
item.description: In Karachi, a man named Ammad Husain has been sentenced to nine years in prison by Judicial Magistrate Gulraiz Memon for distributing sexually explicit videos and pictures of a woman to her in-laws on...

item.title: Interior Minister Naqvi Holds Talks with Chinese Ambassador on Security and Protection of Foreign Nationals
item.description: Interior Minister Mohsin Naqvi held a meeting with Chinese Ambassador Jiang Zedong at the Chinese Embassy in Islamabad, focusing on counter-terrorism, security cooperation, and the Police Exchange Pro...

item.title: FPCCI and business leaders condemn remarks threatening Pakistan's GSP+ trade status
item.description: The Federation of Pakistan Chambers of Commerce and Industry (FPCCI) on Friday strongly condemned statements made against Pakistan's Generalised Scheme of Preferences Plus (GSP+) status under the Euro...

item.title: B.C. court dismisses lawsuit by murder victim’s family against family of executed killer
item.description: A British Columbia court has dismissed a lawsuit filed by the family of a murder victim against the relatives of his convicted killer. The case stemmed from a high-profile murder that took place in Ch...

item.title: Duterte-allied lawyers file new Supreme Court petition to halt Vice President Sara Duterte's impeachment proceedings
item.description: On March 27, 2026, a group of lawyers allied with the Duterte family filed a fresh petition before the Supreme Court seeking to once again stop the impeachment proceedings against Vice President Sara ...

item.title: Belarus and North Korea sign friendship treaty with symbolic gifts exchanged
item.description: The Belarusian President, Alexander Lukashenko, recently visited Pyongyang, North Korea, where he and Kim Jong Un signed a friendship treaty to strengthen their countries' cooperation. Lukashenko, who...

item.title: Ukraine and Saudi Arabia agree on cooperation to strengthen air defence systems
item.description: Ukraine and Saudi Arabia have entered into a new air defence cooperation agreement during President Volodymyr Zelensky’s visit to the kingdom. The accord follows a series of Iranian drone attacks on S...

item.title: Foreign Governments and Rights Groups Condemn Prison Term for Georgian Opposition Leader Elene Khoshtaria
item.description: International and diplomatic actors have strongly condemned the recent prison sentence handed down to Georgian opposition politician Elene Khoshtaria, describing it as politically motivated and dispro...

item.title: Albanese defends Australia’s actions amid Trump’s criticism over Iran conflict
item.description: Australian Prime Minister Anthony Albanese has responded to former US President Donald Trump’s criticism regarding Australia’s support in the Iran war. Trump expressed surprise at Australia’s stance, ...

item.title: China supports Pakistan-led mediation to help resume safe transit through Strait of Hormuz amid US-Iran tensions
item.description: China has expressed support for Pakistan's role as a mediator between the United States and Iran, highlighting the importance of restoring safe navigation through the Strait of Hormuz. During a call b...

item.title: China Denies Report Linking SMIC to Iran Chip Supply
item.description: China on Friday strongly denied recent media reports claiming that its leading semiconductor firm, SMIC, had been sending chipmaking equipment to Iran for over a year. The report, citing unnamed US of...

item.title: US Treasury to Feature President Trump’s Signature on Redesigned Notes for 250th Anniversary
item.description: For the first time in American history, US currency will carry the signature of a sitting president. The Treasury Department announced that notes featuring President Donald Trump’s signature will begi...

item.title: Iranians describe hardships and uncertainty after a month of US-Israel conflict
item.description: After one month of the US-Israel war on Iran, ordinary Iranians are struggling to adapt to a life overshadowed by bombings, economic collapse, and fear. With much of the economy paralysed, inflation s...

item.title: Philippine peso weakens to record low amid Middle East conflict concerns
item.description: The Philippine peso fell to an all-time low of ₱60.55 against the US dollar by the end of a turbulent trading week, driven largely by ongoing concerns over the escalating conflict in the Middle East. ...

item.title: Toronto Blue Jays mark 50 years with renewed World Series ambitions
item.description: The Toronto Blue Jays begin their 50th season in Major League Baseball with high hopes following a near miss in the 2025 World Series against the Los Angeles Dodgers. Since debuting on a snowy April d...

item.title: Local Holiday in Lahore District on 28th March for Mela Chiraghan
item.description: LAHORE: The Punjab government has officially declared a local holiday in Lahore on 28th March 2026 to observe the annual Mela Chiraghan festival, which commemorates the Urs of the revered Sufi saint S...
